title: NimbleBrain Configuration
description: Configuration file for the NimbleBrain agent runtime (nimblebrain.json).

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference URI. Should be "https://schemas.nimblebrain.ai/v1/nimblebrain-config.schema.json".

apiKey.description: Anthropic API key. Falls back to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.

models.description: Allowlist of model IDs. Omit to allow all.
Allowlist of model IDs. Omit to allow all.
Allowlist of model IDs. Omit to allow all.

bundles.description: Bundle configurations. Each entry specifies a bundle by name (mpak registry), local path, or remote URL.

path.description: Local filesystem path to bundle directory.

serverName.description: Override server name for remote bundles.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the bundle process.

allowedEnv.description: Host env vars this bundle may access.

allowInsecureRemotes.description: Allow HTTP (non-TLS) remote bundle connections. Dev only.

reasoning.description: Most capable model for complex analysis.

defaultModel.description: Default model ID (e.g., "claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929"). Deprecated — use models.default instead.

maxIterations.description: Max agentic iterations per request. Capped at 50. Default: 25.

maxInputTokens.description: Max input tokens per request. Default: 500000.

maxHistoryMessages.description: Max conversation messages to include in context. Keeps the first message (initial user request) plus the most recent N messages. Tool call/result pairs count as one unit. Default: 40.

maxOutputTokens.description: Max output tokens per LLM call. Default: 16384.

maxToolResultSize.description: Max chars for a single tool result. Results exceeding this are replaced with an error. 0 disables. Default: 1000000.

disabled.description: Disable structured logging entirely. Default: false.

level.description: Logging verbosity level. 'debug' persists verbose fields (system prompt, tool inputs/outputs, full message history) to conversation files. Default: normal.

retentionDays.description: Auto-delete log files older than N days on startup. Default: no cleanup.

http.description: HTTP server config. Omit for programmatic-only use.

port.description: Port number for the HTTP server. Default: 27247.

workDir.description: Working directory for all runtime state. Defaults to ~/.nimblebrain.

sessionStore.description: MCP session metadata store for /mcp. Tracks each Mcp-Session-Id and its idle TTL. Default: in-memory (process-local). Use 'redis' for multi-replica deploys; the same provider also gives single-replica deploys cluster-wide visibility for ops/admin tooling.

type.description: Provider. 'memory' is process-local (default). 'redis' is cluster-shared (required for platform.replicas > 1).

ttlSeconds.description: Idle TTL for sessions in seconds. Each request resets the clock — actively-used sessions never expire. Default: 28800 (8 h).

url.description: Redis connection URL (redis:// or rediss://). Typically injected via environment from a secret.

keyPrefix.description: Hash key prefix for session entries. Default: 'nb:mcp:session:'.

telemetry.description: Anonymous usage telemetry. Disable with telemetry.enabled: false, NB_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1, or DO_NOT_TRACK=1.

features.description: Feature flags to enable/disable capabilities. All default to true. Set to false to disable.

bundleManagement.description: Enable app install/uninstall/configure via nb__manage_app. Default: true.

skillManagement.description: Enable skill create/update/delete/activate/deactivate/move_scope via the nb__skills tool surface. Default: true.

delegation.description: Enable multi-agent delegation via nb__delegate. Default: true.

toolDiscovery.description: Enable tool search via nb__search scope=tools. Default: true.

bundleDiscovery.description: Enable registry search via nb__search scope=registry. Default: true.

fileContext.description: Enable file context (workspace files, chat attachments). Default: true.

userManagement.description: Enable user create/delete via nb__manage_users (admin only). Default: true.

workspaceManagement.description: Enable workspace CRUD and member management via nb__manage_workspaces (admin only). Default: true.

files.description: File context configuration for workspace file uploads.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum individual file size in bytes. Default: 26214400 (25 MB).

maxTotalSize.description: Maximum total file size per message in bytes. Default: 104857600 (100 MB).

maxFilesPerMessage.description: Maximum number of files per chat message. Default: 10.

maxExtractedTextSize.description: Maximum extracted text size per file in bytes. Default: 204800 (200 KB).
